narrative:
Defiance City 2-A (precinct in Defiance County) has 764 registered voters, with 66.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.8%, a modest Republican lean of 3.7 percentage points.
